http.requestActorNotFound: The request actor was not found.
http.concurrentConflict: A concurrent conflict happened. Please try again.

service.authRequired: Authentication is required for this action.
service.invalidAuthToken: The authorization token is invalid or expired.
service.onlyDoctorsAllowed: Only doctors can perform this action.
service.onlyPatientsAllowed: Only patients can perform this action.
service.doctorIdForbidden: A doctor cannot act on behalf of another doctor.
service.patientIdForbidden: A patient cannot act on behalf of another patient.

service.appointmentNotFoundForDoctor: Appointment was not found for this doctor.
service.appointmentInPast: You cannot book an appointment in the past.
service.appointmentInvalidRange: Appointment end time must be greater than the start time.
service.appointmentSlotBusy: The selected time slot is already occupied.
service.appointmentPatientBusy: The patient already has another appointment at this time.
service.appointmentCancelledCannotComplete: A cancelled appointment cannot be completed.

service.prescriptionRequiresCompletedAppointment: A prescription can only be issued for a completed appointment.
service.prescriptionAlreadyExists: A prescription already exists for this appointment.
